channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Avalanche reward newly acquired goalie Blackwood with 5-year, $26.25 million contract extension
item.description: It didn’t take goalie Mackenzie Blackwood long to establish himself as the Colorado Avalanche’s starter for the present and future after signing a five-year $26.25 million contract extension on Friday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NFL receiver DeSean Jackson hired as the football coach at Delaware State
item.description: DOVER, Del. (AP) — Former NFL receiver DeSean Jackson is taking over the football program at Delaware State. The school announced Jackson's hire Friday in the latest move by a Mid-Eastern Athletic Conference program to hire a former NFL star as its football coach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tigers sign former Yankees second baseman Gleyber Torres to a $15 million, 1-year deal
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Tigers signed former New York Yankees second baseman Gleyber Torres on Friday to a $15 million, one-year contract. The two-time All-Star's deal includes a one-time assignment bonus of $500,000. Torres hit .
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Father of Raiders star Malcolm Koonce has 1983 conviction tossed after DA says it was tainted
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Years before Las Vegas Raiders defensive end Malcolm Koonce was born, his father spent time in prison for an armed robbery conviction that prosecutors now say was tainted by a detective’s lies and “highly suggestive” photo identification techniques.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Alex Ovechkin takes part in a full Capitals practice. He could return Saturday at Toronto
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — Alex Ovechkin's pursuit of Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record should be back on very soon. Signs point to Ovechkin returning to the Washington Capitals' lineup on Saturday night at the Toronto Maple Leafs after missing five weeks with a broken left leg.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles coach Sirianni says it's 'tough' for Hurts to play against Dallas with head injury
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jalen Hurts was still in the NFL's concussion protocol Friday, forcing the Philadelphia Eagles to prepare to play against Dallas without their star quarterback. “It's going to be tough for him to make it this week,” coach Nick Sirianni said Friday.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2 sailors die in the stormy first night of the Sydney to Hobart yacht race, organizers say
item.description: Two sailors on separate boats have died in boom accidents two hours apart on a storm-ravaged first night of the annual Sydney to Hobart race, adding to the event's long history of deaths at sea.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS PASSA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mavs star Luka Doncic will be out about a month before check on calf injury, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Dallas Mavericks superstar Luka Doncic will be out about a month before being re-evaluated for a calf injury sustained in a Christmas Day loss to Minnesota, a person with knowledge of the injury said Friday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cowboys shutting down CeeDee Lamb with 2 games to go over receiver's shoulder issue
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Dallas Cowboys are shutting down CeeDee Lamb with two games remaining after their 2023 All-Pro receiver spent the second half of the season dealing with a sprained right shoulder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pro Picks: Chargers over Patriots is the best bet and Broncos and Vikings will pull off upsets
item.description: Pro Picks is a weekly column where AP Pro Football Writer Rob Maaddi shares his picks for upcoming games. For all previous Pro Picks, head here. ___ Playoff berths, draft positioning and more are up for grabs in Week 17.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears lose rain-soaked rock fight to the Seahawks, drop franchise record-tying 10th straight game
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears final home game of the season against the Seattle Seahawks was offense optional, as rain poured down on Soldier Field in what amounted to a cold, wet rock fight. "I thought special teams played very well.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Sirianni and Ertz cleared the air after exchanging words following Washington's win over the Eagles
item.description: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni and Commanders tight end Zach Ertz cleared the air after they exchanged words following Washington’s comeback win over Philadelphia on Sunday. Videos show Ertz gave Sirianni a high-five as they were headed in opposite directions.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Appellate court overturns rape conviction of ex-49ers star Dana Stubblefield
item.description: Judges declare the 2020 conviction of the former NFL Defensive Player of the Year is 'legally invalid' after finding his race factored into authorities' decision not to search his home for a gun.
item.dc:creator: Robert Salonga, The Mercury News

item.title: DeSean Jackson finalizing deal to become latest ex-NFL star to land college head coaching job: report
item.description: DeSean Jackson has become the latest ex-NFL player to join the collegiate ranks. He is reportedly finalizing a deal with Delaware State.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Toledo, Pitt make bowl game history in extended contest that becomes instant classic
item.description: Toledo took down Pitt, 48-46, in Thursday's GameAbove Sports Bowl in Detroit that took six overtimes to complete, the most in bowl game history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Teddy Bridgewater comes out of retirement to sign with Lions after winning high school state title as coach
item.description: After coaching his alma mater to a high school state title in Florida, quarterback Teddy Bridgewater is out of retirement and back with the Detroit Lions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US sex-abuse watchdog fires investigator after learning of his arrest for stealing drug money
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The U.S. Center for SafeSport abruptly fired one of its investigators last month after learning he'd been arrested for stealing money confiscated after a drug bust he was part of during his previous job as a police officer.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wayne Gretzky's wife shares Trump post floating NHL legend as Canadian prime minister
item.description: President-elect Trump floated Wayne Gretzky as the prime minister of Canada on Wednesday, and it appeared the hockey legend's wife was watching as she shared the post on her own social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James fires warning shot to NFL about Christmas Day games
item.description: Los Angeles Lakers star LeBron James had a message for the NFL as it continued to encroach on the NBA's day, which has been Christmas for years.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jared Goff throws 3 TD passes as Lions beat Bears 34-17 for franchise-record 13th win
item.description: Jared Goff and the Detroit Lions locked in from the start and delivered a bounce-back performance. It came with a few team records, too.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5
